_comment: Conformance corpus — negative cases. A conformant validator MUST reject every msg here for the documented reason. The reason is illustrative; exact error wording is implementation-defined.

cases.name: ctx-invalid-uppercase
cases.reason: ctx_id regex does not allow uppercase

cases.name: A1-unsorted
cases.reason: ΔITEMs must be sorted ascending by (op, etype, id)

cases.name: A2-unsorted-dkeys
cases.reason: DPAIRs must be sorted by dkey ascending

cases.name: A3-unsorted-mkeys
cases.reason: METs must be sorted by mkey ascending

cases.name: A4-sev-desc-violated
cases.reason: RISKs must be sorted by sev DESCENDING

cases.name: A5-gates-unsorted
cases.reason: GATEs must be sorted by (scope, invariant) ascending

cases.name: A6-kvs-unsorted
cases.reason: KV pairs within an inventory item must be sorted by k ascending

cases.name: boolean-value
cases.reason: bools are not in the allowed atom types (int, str, arr)

cases.name: wrong-top-shape
cases.reason: MSG must be exactly [H, B] — not three elements
